utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution provides all six sections. Each is fully specified: (1) property includes type, bedrooms, price, currency, and description; (2) financing includes type, down payment, mortgage amount, rate, term, and monthly payment; (3) legal_services includes service name, cost, and currency; (4) moving_services includes service name, cost, and currency; (5) setup_services includes utility package, included services, monthly cost, currency, and property survey details; (6) total_budget includes all cost elements, breakdowns, and currency. All items are fully covered with all details.
